summary: Frontend smoke + e2e testing of the rewritten Muk Buddy landing (LIGHT DTC theme). All 16 sections render, external links + video modal + FAQ accordion + LeadForm work. Backend POST /api/leads returns 201 end-to-end. No console errors, no broken images, no horizontal overflow on desktop or mobile.

issues: No mobile hamburger / nav menu. The 4 nav links (How It Works / The Money / FAQ / Contact) are hidden on <md screens via `hidden md:flex` with no replacement — mobile users can only tap the logo or 'Grab One'. Minor UX gap, not blocking.

action_items: Consider adding a mobile nav (hamburger drawer) so mobile visitors can reach FAQ / The Money / Contact without manual scrolling. Low priority.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero.jsx video modal uses conditional render + setTimeout(50ms) + videoRef.current.play() — works but is brittle. A more robust pattern: set ref then call play in a useEffect keyed off `playing`. Currently no functional issue observed.
LeadForm.jsx honeypot field `website` is a nice touch; backend accepts it (confirmed 201). No issue.

IMAGES.productVideo uses a .mov file served directly in a <video> tag — works in Chromium in testing, but .mov is not universally supported (Firefox). Consider providing an .mp4/.webm fallback <source> for cross-browser reliability.
Header.jsx: nav links are hidden below md breakpoint with no mobile menu alternative — minor accessibility/UX concern.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_ leads in MongoDB via POST /api/leads during smoke + form test. If cleanup matters, filter by email like testsmoke@example.com and agent@example.com.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview URL https://two-chamber-test.preview.emergentagent.com. Light cream background IS the intended design — not a bug. Drippy Nosifer font on headings, Bowlby/Bangers accents are intentional. Video modal test must click the watch button then wait ~1500ms before querying [data-testid=hero-video] (conditional render + setTimeout inside component). FAQ accordion uses shadcn Accordion with data-state='open'|'closed' on the trigger button. Leadform POST goes to ${REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL}/api/leads and returns 201 with a generated uuid.
tested_flows: All 11 data-testid sections present (landing-page, site-header, hero-section, hero-headline, hero-mascot, hero-order-btn, hero-watch-btn, hero-watch-btn-mini, faq-section, lead-form-section, final-cta-section)
'Grab One', 'Feed The Monster', 'Unleash Muk Buddy' all href=https://thefloorlord.com/product/muk-buddy/ with target=_blank
Watch It Eat modal opens and loads .mov video src
SEE IT RUN mini card also opens the same video modal
LeadForm: empty submit -> 'Please enter your name.' toast
LeadForm: invalid email -> 'Please enter a valid email.' toast
LeadForm: valid submit -> 201 + 'Message sent. We'll be in touch.' toast (verified end-to-end with MongoDB via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL)
Mobile (375): no horizontal overflow, all sections stack cleanly at full-width
